localizations.title: Tombstone Express
localizations.hiddenObject_2: A card is stuck in the door of the passenger car.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Did you closely look at the armchair in the bar car?
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Don't you see anything when closing the briefcase?
localizations.code_6342: The padlock unlocks! As you enter the freight car, you believe you hear a muffled sound.
localizations.code_8511_early: You're making progress, it's undeniable! It will probably be helpful down the line!
localizations.code_7826: You arrest Nock, but he doesn't have Geronimo's Heart on him. He ends up admitting that he is the accomplice of Marshal John, whom he helped by his diversion. But John has disappeared and with him, all peace hopes…
localizations.code_2930: You arrest Nock, but he doesn't have Geronimo's Heart on him. He ends up admitting that he is the accomplice of Marshal John, whom he helped by his diversion. But John has disappeared and with him, all peace hopes…
localizations.code_5847: You arrest Marshal John and Nock, his accomplice. The wound is fake and you find Geronimo's Heart in his boot! The peace treaty has been saved and you become a Legend of the West!
localizations.code_6910: You arrest Marshal John and Nock, his accomplice. The wound is fake and you find Geronimo's Heart in his boot! The peace treaty has been saved and you become a Legend of the West!
localizations.code_168: Wako protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_4759: Wako protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_1031: Awea protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, she doesn't have the jewel. You failed.

localizations.code_2039: Hank protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_9780: Snow protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_5820: Snow protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_8511: The door opens as if by magic!
localizations.code_690_early: You're making progress, it's undeniable! It will probably be helpful down the line!
localizations.code_1668_early: You're making progress, it's undeniable! It will probably be helpful down the line!
localizations.code_9999: You end your investigation in the car, then you go back to the roof to reach the following cars.
localizations.code_4: Too late! The Apaches control the situation but Geronimo's Heart has disappeared for good. Peace is now compromised.
localizations.code_5: Too late! The passengers have vanished into thin air. Geronimo's Heart has disappeared for good. Peace is now compromised.
localizations.code_4362: No, it doesn't work. After all, you're looking into a mirror…
localizations.code_690: Nothing's happening. It's probably not the right tune…
localizations.code_1668: Nothing's happening. It's probably not the right tune…
localizations.code_134: Wako protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_1941: Awea protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, she doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_5813: Jack protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_5497: Sean protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_5879: Jane protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, she doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_9573: Hank protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.code_3263: Snow protests: "It's unfair!" After a meticulous search you must face the facts, he doesn't have the jewel. You failed.
localizations.hint_8: When you close this briefcase, something appears on the side.
localizations.hint_85: HANK can teach you his tune and two anthems. Only one will be useful, but which one?
localizations.hint_11: You must shoot out the lock.
localizations.hint_15: You must find something to light it.
localizations.hint_16_first: In order to open it, you must understand the coded document. The one mentioning Lincoln's death.
localizations.hint_16: The year of Lincoln's death is in the newspaper. You must add to it the stars of the flag.
localizations.hint_18: The numbers reflect in the mirror. So the IV is a VI, and vice versa.
localizations.hint_20: Sometimes it is more efficient than a badge to make men talk.
localizations.hint_22: With a strong poker hand of 5 cards, you should be able to beat a player.
localizations.hint_25: With a blanket, you should be able to send smoke signals.
localizations.hint_28: An item in the safe will point out to the correct path.
localizations.hint_30: Women are often impressed by it…
localizations.hint_32_first: The X seem to isolate some words composing a coded message.
localizations.hint_32: Take the X-marked words on the letter (47) to understand the true message.
localizations.hint_33: With a strong poker hand of 5 cards, you should be able to beat this player.
localizations.hint_34: He is poor. Maybe a coin will make him more cooperative?
localizations.hint_37_first: The A train line follows a path starting in texAs.
localizations.hint_37: Count the number of A on each step of the path.
localizations.hint_38_first: You must play the correct tune on the harmonica to pass.
localizations.hint_38: What tune should you play? Theoretically, not the Union anthem…
localizations.hint_43: With a strong poker hand of 5 cards, you should be able to beat JACK.
localizations.hint_86: A strange code connected to Lincoln's death. You still must find the connected elements.
localizations.hint_51: For some, that's how fortune starts.
localizations.hint_52: Some display of authority should get you what you want.
localizations.hint_53: With a strong poker hand of 5 cards, you should be able to beat JACK.
localizations.hint_74: You must send the correct number. The last sentence in the newspaper (J) should help.
localizations.hint_81: Your eyes are drawn to the mirror behind the bartender.
localizations.hint_88: With a strong poker hand of 5 cards, you should be able to beat a player.
localizations.hint_111: The back of the bartender's vest will give you the code.
localizations.machine_12: The locomotive is in motion again. You can resume your investigation.
localizations.machine_28: A hidden panel behind the map opens. There's no sign of the Heart but you find a wire. Hurry up! Tombstone is getting closer!
localizations.machine_74: Nice smoke rings. Nothing's happening. Well, one never knows in the West…
localizations.event_1: Behind you, an explosion shakes the train, then gunshots resound. The armored car is under attack!
localizations.event_2: Multiple gunshots resound all around you. The train windows are smashed to pieces.
localizations.event_3: The train slows down then stops in the middle of nowhere!
localizations.event_4: Dozens of armed Apaches surround the train! The peace treaty is compromised…
localizations.event_5: The train pulls into the Tombstone station. Passengers start getting off. The Heart must be found before it vanishes forever.
localizations.dont_touch: Dude, don't touch this! Goes like clockwork.
localizations.machine17_hint1: Whatever you do, don't touch the two dials in the middle!
localizations.machine17_hint2: Touch each dial once except those in the middle!
